description: Issue flags surface only inside a parse-error string; there is no per-subcommand help. Add issue create --help and issue update --help (and -h) that print the flag table with each flag's type — STRING / LIST-repeatable / BOOLEAN / INTEGER — and a note that LIST flags repeat one item per occurrence. Depends on S1 so the type labels and the repeat note describe the shipped behavior.
title: issue create and issue update print a --help flag reference
root_cause: Flag discovery relies on triggering an error; the known-flags list carries no types or repeat semantics.
fix: Add a help renderer driven by ISSUE_FIELD_FLAGS that prints flag, type label, and target field; register -h/--help handling in the issue subcommand dispatch before required-flag checks.
acceptance_criteria: issue create --help exits zero and lists every issue flag with its type label
The output states that list flags repeat one item per occurrence
issue update --help renders the same reference
